title: Billotia alpina
intro: Billotia alpina, also known as Alpine Soprum, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Apiaceae. Traditionally, Billotia alpina has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The bioactive constituents of Billotia alpina include sesquiterpenes, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. Billotia alpina is commonly used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, often blended with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.

The specific classification of Billotia alpina can also be represented in a binomial nomenclature system.
